name: Canada National Security Architecture — Senior Leadership KPV Assessment
description: KPV assessment of Canadian national security senior leadership. Sources: PCO public org, CSIS annual reports, CSE public charter, parliamentary security committee reports.

roles.title: National Security and Intelligence Adviser to the PM
roles.notes: PCO NSIA; Five Eyes NSA relationships; IC and PM coordination. Source: PCO public org; NSIRA annual reports.

roles.title: Director, CSIS
roles.notes: CSIS HUMINT and CI. Senate NSICOP testimony re: shell company problem in ICA reviews. Source: CSIS Annual Report; NSICOP public reports 2024.

roles.title: Chief, Communications Security Establishment
roles.notes: SIGINT and active cyber operations. Five Eyes SIGINT partner. Source: CSE public charter; NSI Act Canada 2019.

roles.title: RCMP National Security Programme Director
roles.notes: Federal law enforcement/national security. ICA review support. Source: RCMP public org.

roles.title: Director of Investments, Investment Canada
roles.notes: ICA national security review authority; CFIUS Canadian equivalent. Shell company beneficial ownership gap documented in 2024 NSICOP testimony. Source: ICA R.S.C. 1985 c.28; NSICOP 2024.

roles.title: NSIA Deputy — Intelligence Assessment
roles.notes: Intelligence assessment coordination across IC. Source: PCO public org.

roles.title: Commander, CFB Trenton (Strategic Airlift Hub)
roles.notes: ICA reviews near CFB Trenton documented in NSICOP agricultural land analysis. Canadian Forces primary strategic airlift. Source: DND public org; NSICOP.
